creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
gimp crashes when using a locale where umlauts or similar exists, and
the locale is 8859-x. With C locale, or a UTF-8 locale it works. Seems
it  is the translations (i.e. the po-files) that are the problem?

Fix: 

Work around the problem is obvious, use C or a unicode locale.
How-To-Repeat: rambutan:girgen$ echo $LC_ALL
sv_SE.ISO8859-1
rambutan:girgen$ gimp

rambutan:girgen$ LC_ALL=C
rambutan:girgen$ gimp   (works fine, but app is in English, of course)
rambutan:girgen$ LC_ALL=sv_SE.UTF-8

rambutan:girgen$
